Woven Widow Silk  
 


WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Woven Widow Silk

WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:20
Merchant Value:0 pp 2 gp 5 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 07:09:11
Page Updated:Fri Jun 2nd, 2023

Expansion: Legacy of Ykesha
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Toxxulia Forest
NPC Name
a giant widow - Toxxulia Forest
a large widow - Toxxulia Forest

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Paineel
Quest Name
Abattoir Initiate Boots
Abattoir Initiate Cap
Abattoir Initiate Gloves
Abattoir Initiate Pantaloons
Abattoir Initiate Robe
Abattoir Initiate Sleeves
Abattoir Initiate Wristband

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Toxxulia Forest
Send a correction
Post Comment
woven widow silk
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2011 at 6:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1668989827372
Scholar
17 posts
All the woven widow silks I got dropped off large widows, not giant widows.

I found them south west of the bridge, south of the curve in the river. There's a low spot around loc -437, -1214, +32 that everything seems to path through. Large widows are an uncommon spawn; I didn't see more than one or two up at a time, and the woven widow silk dropped about once every three kills.
▲ Page top
woven widow silk
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2011 at 10:01 PM Rating: Good
snailish
4,580 posts
got 10 of these in 3 hours of killing everything in southern tox. I was killing everything to get spiders to spawn as there was hardly any up in zone when I got there (a ranger was looking for woven silk at the same time for an alt). I didn't pay close attention the first bunch I looted but my last 3-4 all came from Large Widows.
▲ Page top
silk
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2004 at 6:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763452524
18 posts
I was there about a week ago or maybe 2. Killed some hatchling and some other spiders around the arear by the water. got 2 of them in about 30 min on CT server.
▲ Page top
Insanely Rare
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2004 at 9:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766622853
38 posts
I started up a Euridite Necro a few days ago.

I've basically been fighting for the past 12 hours looking for one of these guys to spawn and kill them for the silk.

In that time, I've seen...

0 Widow Hatchlings
4-5 Large Widows
6-7 Giant Widows

And gotten... 3 Widow Silks.

A bit peterbed, I switched to my Druid, and started tracking them. I found dozens of hatchlings, mostly on the "good" side of Tox Forest. No silk on any of them, so I moved to the POK book on the evil side of Tox. 3 hours later, I see my first Giant Widow. Kill it, no silk. Haven't seen one since.

Disgustingly difficult. It's just not worth the effort, unfortunately.

- Kromdor
52nd Season Berserker
Morden Rasp
▲ Page top
more common now
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2004 at 12:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789791776
Scholar
21 posts
SOE must have fixed the rarity of drops with last nights patch (10/13). Killed 6 large widows in Tox this morning, and 5 widow silks dropped, all right by pok book on evil side. Goodluck everyone!
▲ Page top
not common....
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2004 at 8:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789791776
Scholar
21 posts
/sighs
I got 2 trackers in Tox forest, one working the north side of river, and one working south. We both are slaughtering everything. NOthing seems to be a PH for either the large or giant widows. We only get one large or one giant to spawn at a time (every 30 minutes or so), and they maybe have dropped one woven widow silk every 10 kills.
Thank you SOE for making this so much fun =(

Edited, Tue Oct 12 21:56:27 2004
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# May 21 2004 at 4:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798119586
2 posts
Are they no drop??
▲ Page top
RE: No drop?
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2004 at 7:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766622853
38 posts
No. These are droppable. Feel free to find a nice ranger or druid to track the mobs and kill them for you.
▲ Page top
is there any place in the game......
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2003 at 11:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361354431
24 posts
....that has more of these widows than tox does? Because they are hardly ever to be found there. On rare occasions can i find them there and then sometimes they dont even drop the woven widow silk.

HATCHLINGS
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2003 at 12:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789518183

I HAVE GOT SOME OFF OF THE WIDOW HATCHLINGS IN TOX ALSO. THOUGH NOT THAT OFTEN.
▲ Page top
RE: Where is Woven Widow Silk
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2003 at 8:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245817329
6 posts
They drop off Large Widows. The Giant Widows drop Woven Spider Silks. Also, the large widows are not that common.
▲ Page top
RE: Where is Woven Widow Silk
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2004 at 8:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770806697
15 posts
Actually, they drop from widow hatchlings, large widows, and giant widows. The problem is, they also all drop woven spider silks. The large and giant drop spider silk, and the hatchlings can drop spiderling silk.
▲ Page top
Where Is Woven Widow Silk?
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2003 at 11:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794476078
5 posts
Can someone please tell me which creature drops these, or how to make them?

Thanks!

Lou
